zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Stapleton於1280年出生時，他的父親Sir Miles Stapleton I18歲，母親Sibyl Bellew11歲。他於大約1316年與Isabella Richmond結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1343年在英國英格蘭越可爾德拉享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Stapleton于1280年出生时，他的父亲Sir Miles Stapleton I18岁，母亲Sibyl Bellew11岁。他于大约1316年与Isabella Richmond结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1343年在英国英格兰越可爾德拉享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stapleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Stapleton (in Devon, Gloucestershire, Somerset, Herefordshire, Shropshire, Leicestershire, North Yorkshire, Yorkshire, Cumberland), all named in Old English with stapol ‘post, pillar’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The name is common in Ireland, where it has been established since medieval times in the counties of Tipperary and Kilkenny.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Stapleton was born in 1280, his father, Sir Miles Stapleton I, was 18 and his mother, Sibyl Bellew, was 11. He married Isabella Richmond about 1316. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1343, in Drax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Stapleton est né en 1280, son père, Sir Miles Stapleton I, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Sibyl Bellew, avait 11 ans. Il a épousé Isabella Richmond environ 1316. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1343, à Drax, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Stapleton 1280 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Miles Stapleton I 18 und seine Mutter Sibyl Bellew 11. Er hat um 1316 Isabella Richmond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1343 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Drax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Stapleton è nato il nel 1280, il suo padre, Sir Miles Stapleton I, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Sibyl Bellew, aveva 11 anni. Lui sposato Isabella Richmond circa 1316. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1343, nel Drax, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Stapletonが1280年に生まれた時，父Sir Miles Stapleton Iは18歳，母Sibyl Bellewは11歳であった。約1316年にIsabella Richmondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1343年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアドラックスで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Stapleton(이)가 1280년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Miles Stapleton I(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibyl Bellew(은)는 11세였다. 그는 대략 1316년 Isabella Richmond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1343년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 드라스에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Drax, Yorkshire, England: Drax, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Stapleton nasceu em 1280, seu pai, Sir Miles Stapleton I, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Sibyl Bellew, tinha 11 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella Richmond aproximadamente 1316. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1343, em Drax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Stapleton родился в 1280 г., его отцу по имени Sir Miles Stapleton I было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibyl Bellew, 11. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella Richmond около 1316 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1343 г. в местности дракс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Stapleton nació en 1280, su papá, Sir Miles Stapleton I, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Sibyl Bellew, tenía 11 años. Se casó con Isabella Richmond aproximadamente 1316. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1343, en Drax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años.
